calibration.note: Calibration data not available via OQ API; select qubits from latest Ankaa-3 calibration report

calibration_note: Open Quantum API does not expose backend calibration data (T1, T2, gate errors). Qubit selection was based on the published Ankaa-3 calibration report. See qubit_selection.json for details.

transpilation.note: OQ compiles to native gate set server-side. No client-side transpilation. Gate decomposition not available via API.

random_basis_selection.note: Random 8q bases generated via rigetti_8qubit_compositional._generate_random_bases(seed=shuffle_seed+1=2027). K* bases generated deterministically via _greedy_optimal_bases() from 4q K* bases. Circuit submission order interleaved with RandomState(2026).
random_basis_selection.code: from rigetti_8qubit_compositional import generate_all_circuits; circuits = generate_all_circuits(shuffle_seed=2026)
